_comment: py_mnn_kb configuration - aligns with Android OfflineAI RAG settings

embedding._comment: Path to MNN embedding model directory (absolute or relative to this config file). py_mnn_kb now uses pyMNN only.

knowledge_base._comment: Knowledge base storage root (absolute or relative to this config file). DB will be at knowledge_bases/<name>/knowledge_graph.db

graph_ner._comment: Path to custom dictionary (.json) and stopwords file (.json). null or empty = disabled.

chunking._comment: Text splitting parameters - mirror Android ConfigManager defaults

retrieval._comment: RAG retrieval parameters - mirror Android ConfigManager defaults
retrieval._comment_bm25: BM25+RRF hybrid retrieval: fuses keyword ranking with vector ranking before GraphRAG

llm_api._comment: LLM API settings for RAG generation in demo. openai-compatible endpoint.
llm_api.system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant. Answer the question based on the provided context. If the context doesn't contain the answer, say so.
